title: Smears
content:
A snowy morning
    unfolding
    I smear my eyes
    the crimson details
    from my life.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Cameron Brown, titled "Smears", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
